title: quercus × lanuginosa subsp. anselmii
intro: Quercus × lanuginosa subsp. anselmii, also known as Italian white oak, is a deciduous tree species that belongs to the beech family (Fagaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Quercus × lanuginosa subsp. anselmii include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
